summary: Frontend testing completed for login button visibility on mobile. All 4 test scenarios passed: Login button 'دخول' appears in Header and bottom nav for non-logged-in users, changes to 'حسابي' after login, and all 5 bottom nav items are present.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.js line 340-349: Login button correctly shows only when !user with data-testid='login-btn'
MobileNav.js line 108: Bottom nav correctly shows 'دخول' for non-logged users and 'حسابي' for logged users
AuthContext.js: Token is stored in localStorage and user state is managed correctly
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login button visibility feature works correctly on mobile (390x844). Header shows 'دخول' for non-logged users, hidden after login. Bottom nav shows 'دخول' → 'حسابي' transition. Test with data-testid selectors: login-btn, phone-input, password-input, login-submit-btn, nav-دخول, nav-حسابي

Header login button for non-logged user.details: data-testid='login-btn' visible with text 'دخول' when user is null

All 5 bottom nav items.details: الرئيسية، الأصناف، طعام، السلة، دخول - all present

user_complaint_analysis: User screenshot showed 'حسابي' instead of 'دخول' which means user WAS logged in. The feature is working correctly - 'حسابي' appears for logged-in users, 'دخول' for non-logged users. No bug found.
